message:
Refactor Kafka diagnostics for to_kafka and from_kafka

Align neo to_kafka diagnostics with the improved from_kafka style and reduce duplicated diagnostic logic.

- replace to_kafka flush/logger warnings with structured diagnostics
- include bootstrap/TLS/SASL/IAM notes on to_kafka produce/flush failures
- track resolved IAM auth in neo to_kafka for consistent failure context
- factor shared Kafka diagnostic note helpers into librdkafka_utils
- switch from_kafka metadata failure notes to shared helper functions
- improve IAM callback diagnostics to distinguish source-credential and assume-role failures
